home.title: Human
home.description: Problem solver, mostly with code. I build small apps and tools, sometimes with an AI in the loop, and keep notes along the way.
home.seoDescription: Problem solver, mostly with code. I build small apps and tools, sometimes with an AI in the loop, and keep notes along the way.

aiEngineering.title: Agents & co.
aiEngineering.description: Small tools and runtimes for AI agents. I automate the boring parts, then supervise the robots.

aiAgents.title: Everything as code
aiAgents.description: Composable, versioned, reproducible. If it can't be rebuilt from a file, it doesn't exist.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: Software that outlives the hype cycle. Boring on purpose.

decentralization.title: Own your stuff
decentralization.description: Self-hosting, open source, and tools that don't phone home.

articles.title: Articles
articles.seoDescription: Notes on what I build, what I learn, and where it's all heading. The occasional robot does my chores.
articles.highlightDescription: Notes on what I learn while building software.

experiments.title: Experiments
experiments.seoDescription: Apps, tools and experiments. Some shipped, some gloriously unfinished.
experiments.highlightDescription: Things I've built along the way. Shipped, half-shipped, or lovingly abandoned.

photographs.title: Photographs
photographs.seoDescription: Photography portfolio featuring travel, street, and everyday moments. A visual journal capturing authentic scenes from around the world.
photographs.highlightDescription: A simple collection of moments and places that caught my eye.

footer.description: Apps, tools and notes, built in the open.
